question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not list the main chapters or the structural outline of the thesis itself. It only provides a project timeline (development plan) which lists milestones and tasks, but not the thesis composition.

question: Description
feedback: The text describes the problem and the relevance of the topic well, but it does not describe the contents of the upcoming thesis sections or chapters.

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure of the thesis is not clear from this text. While the topic and research goals are well-defined, the reader cannot see how the final document is organized (e.g., what the theoretical or practical chapters will entail).
